title: lasianthus coffeoides
intro: Lasianthus coffeoides, also known as the coffee bush tree, is a plant species in the family Theaceae, native to Southeast Asia. Its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus coffeoides include its ability to aid in reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus coffeoides can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
